pages: Welcome to the tutorial room! Here you'll learn the basic actions. It will only take a moment. First, use WASD or the arrow keys to move.
Great! Now use SPACE (or Q) to go up, and CTRL (or X) to go down.
Excellent! Now approach that human. Get close and press F or Left Mouse Button to sting them!
Well done! Keep in mind that you can change the camera view if you don't like it by pressing ESC and selecting the view mode. Enjoy Untitled Bee Game!
